Banking Offers, Borrowing and Advice for Medical and Dental Students

RBC Healthcare Advantage is designed to support medical and dental professionals with fee waivers, preferred interest rates and special offers.

Interest Rate: RBC Prime minus 0.25% on line of credit.

Earn 30,000 Avion points upon approval.

Borrow up to $400,000 and access up to $100,000 in year one on your line of credit.

Monthly fee: $30 $0 ($360 annual savings).

Offer is designed for medical and dental students in Canada.
